title: [CI:DOCS] GHA: Re-use identical workflow from buildah repo
body:
It's a PITA to maintain duplicate code across repos.  Relatively
github-actions added a feature that allows re-using workflows
from other repos.  Use that here to reduce duplication.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body:
It's a bit of a pain to test this github-actions workflow, since all schedule and dispatch triggers only look at the file on `main`.  However, this change is substantially similar to what's used in several other repos currently.  [For example in netavark.](https://github.com/containers/netavark/blob/main/.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml)

After this is merged, I'll manually trigger it and confirm it's working properly.

I tickled the manual trigger to [make this run before the scheduled time...](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/actions/runs/2828454685)

...yep it's working.  Even sent a notification e-mail due to [a failure on release-1.6](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/6170713638830080) (probably a flake)
